channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Drift Detective
item.description: Detect AI model drift with real-time monitoring

item.title: SaaS Pricing
item.description: SaaS pricing strategy and implementation

item.title: API Speed: Beyond Caching and Compression
item.description: Real-world API performance gains come from protobuf, HTTP/2, and edge caching. See 66% smaller payloads and 50% lower latency with gRPC-Web.

item.title: Stop Chasing Alerts: Monitor Proactively
item.description: Synthetic monitoring cuts incident detection from 28 minutes to 90 seconds. Real-world metrics, code samples, and tools that prevent outages before users notice.

item.title: Secure Your Cloud Apps: Dev-Friendly Guide
item.description: Practical cloud security: stop misconfigurations, enforce least-privilege IAM, rotate secrets, and audit with real AWS numbers and code.

item.title: AI Prompting
item.description: Unlock AI prompting secrets for 25% accuracy boost

item.title: Git Commands Senior Devs Swear By
item.description: Senior developers use specific Git commands daily to maintain clean history, debug faster, and prevent merge chaos. Real-world performance data included.

item.title: Web App Security Audit: What Actually Works
item.description: Real-world web app security audit process with Burp, Semgrep, and manual testing. 70% attack surface reduction, 40-hour case study, CSP and IDOR fixes.

item.title: VS Code Setup That 2x Your Speed
item.description: Real-world VS Code optimizations that cut edit-to-commit time from 8.4 to 3.1 minutes. Includes config, extensions, and team rollout strategy.

item.title: SRE: Fixing What Breaks Silent
item.description: SRE isn't about preventing outages—it's about controlling failure. Learn how error budgets, burn rates, and automation actually work in production.

item.title: How Hackers Really Breach Systems
item.description: Hackers exploit misconfigurations and logic flaws, not magic. See how breaches happen and how to stop them with real tools and data.

item.title: ASO That Actually Moves Rankings
item.description: ASO isn't about keywords. Real ranking gains come from retention, engagement, and Apple's hidden behavioral signals. Data from 17 app campaigns.

item.title: Solo Dev? Scale Like a Pro
item.description: Solo devs can scale apps to thousands of users. Real benchmarks, code examples, and tools like Fly.io, Postgres, and Redis.

item.title: Fix Slow Queries: Real Database Wins
item.description: Slow queries waste resources and hurt UX. Real fixes using PostgreSQL, indexes, and monitoring—backed by 94% performance gains and production war stories.

item.title: Why Your Code Docs Fail and How to Fix Them
item.description: Most code docs fail because developers lack structured writing skills. Real-world fixes with Vale, MkDocs, and ADRs that cut onboarding time by 52%.

item.title: Mobile App Security
item.description: Mobile app security vulnerabilities can compromise user data, with 75% of apps having at least one vulnerability

item.title: Create Your AI Butler
item.description: Build a personal AI assistant with a user-centric approach

item.title: AI Widens Wealth Gap
item.description: AI widens wealth gap, exacerbating inequality

item.title: 2026 Data Breach Disasters
item.description: 2026 data breach disasters: causes, effects, and prevention

item.title: AI Showdown: GPT vs Claude vs Gemini
item.description: GPT vs Claude vs Gemini: AI showdown
